# remnawave_passkey (Resource)

Manages a Remnawave WebAuthn passkey. This is an import-only resource: passkeys cannot be created via Terraform (registration requires an interactive WebAuthn ceremony). Import an existing passkey by its UUID, then destroy it with `terraform destroy`. Requires admin JWT auth (username/password), not an API token.

## Example Usage

```terraform
# Import an existing passkey so it can be managed by Terraform
resource "remnawave_passkey" "laptop" {
  # All attributes are computed after import — no configuration needed.
}

# Import:
#   terraform import remnawave_passkey.laptop <passkey-uuid>
```

~> **Note** Passkey registration is an interactive WebAuthn ceremony that cannot be automated. This resource only supports import (to bring an existing passkey into state) and delete (to remove it from the panel).

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Read-Only

- `created_at` (String) Creation timestamp.
- `name` (String) Human-readable passkey name.
- `uuid` (String) Passkey UUID.

## Import

Import is supported using the following syntax:

```shell
# Import a passkey by its UUID
terraform import remnawave_passkey.example <passkey-uuid>
```
